name: SmartThings
description: Samsung SmartThings skill pack for OpenClaw. Milestone 1 ships plugin-managed skills plus plugin config for the external adapter bridge.

configSchema.description: Config for the external SmartThings adapter used by the milestone 1 skill pack. Environment variables still override these values at runtime.

adapterUrl.description: Base URL for the external SmartThings adapter. When unset, helper scripts fall back to http://127.0.0.1:8787.

adapterToken.description: Optional bearer token sent to the SmartThings adapter.
